gh project edit NUMBER --owner OWNER --title 'New Title'
gh project copy NUMBER --source-owner OWNER --target-owner OWNER --title 'Copy'
gh project link NUMBER --owner OWNER --repo owner/repo
gh project unlink NUMBER --owner OWNER --repo owner/repo
gh project field-create NUMBER --owner OWNER --name 'Field' --data-type TEXT
gh project item-add NUMBER --owner OWNER --url ISSUE_OR_PR_URL
gh project item-create NUMBER --owner OWNER --title 'Draft issue'
gh project item-edit ITEM_ID --project-id PROJECT_ID --field-id FIELD_ID --text 'Value'
gh project item-archive NUMBER --owner OWNER --id ITEM_ID
gh project item-delete NUMBER --owner OWNER --id ITEM_ID
